$comment: D-FFI-TCL-DESCRIPTOR (SQLite testfixture arc, C28 2026-07-20): RUN witness for the 6 need-driven tcl.json items growing the test1.c surface -- Tcl_GetDouble (tclDecls.h:146, exported T), Tcl_DStringAppend (tclDecls.h:382, exported T), the Tcl_DStringLength(dsPtr)->((dsPtr)->length) macro (tcl.h:1014, LENGTH twin of the shipped Tcl_DStringValue, over the C13 Tcl_DString `length` field -- no new layout), and the 3 object-macro constants TCL_EVAL_DIRECT=0x040000 / TCL_LEAVE_ERR_MSG=0x200 / TCL_LINK_STRING=4. Value-divergent: Tcl_DStringAppend builds a 42-byte string INSIDE libtcl (opaque extern), and that byte count -- read back via the Tcl_DStringLength macro -- is the exit code (a broken append / wrong-field macro never yields 42); Tcl_GetDouble's parse is a runtime gate; the 3 constants are value-pinned (wrong value -> 4/5/6). elf-x86_64 only (tcl.json availableObjectFormats:[elf]); CI ubuntu x86_64 legs run it, native-arm64 arch-gates the run, windows/macos compile-only. Release arm runs the optimizer over the libtcl calls. RED-ON-DISABLE: remove any of the 6 items from tcl.json -> S0001 -> fails to compile.
